question: Which games were published by Nintendo?
rag_answer:
• Advance Wars
  • Animal Crossing: New Horizons
  • Duck Hunt
  • Mario Kart 8/Deluxe
  • Mario Kart Wii
  • New Super Mario Bros.
  • New Super Mario Bros. Wii
  • Pokémon Gold/Silver/Crystal
  • Pokémon Red/Blue/Yellow
  • Super Mario Bros.
  ... and 7 more
sparql:
PREFIX vg: <http://videogame-kg.org/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?title WHERE {
    ?game vg:hasTitle ?title .
    ?game vg:hasPublisher ?pub .
    ?pub rdfs:label ?pubLabel .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?pubLabel)) = "nintendo")
}
LIMIT 20

question: Which games have sold more than 100 million copies?
sparql:
PREFIX vg: <http://videogame-kg.org/ontology#>
SELECT ?title ?sales WHERE {
    ?game vg:hasTitle ?title .
    ?game vg:salesMillions ?sales .
    FILTER(?sales > 100)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?sales)
LIMIT 20

question: What games were self-published by their developer?
rag_answer:
• Advance Wars
  • Age of Empires
  • Age of Empires II
  • Alien: Isolation
  • Alone in the Dark
  • Angry Birds
  • Animal Crossing: New Horizons
  • Super Mario Odyssey
  • The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
  • Another World
  ... and 10 more
sparql:
PREFIX vg: <http://videogame-kg.org/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?title WHERE {
    ?game vg:hasTitle ?title .
    ?game vg:hasDeveloper ?dev .
    ?dev rdfs:label ?devLabel .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?devLabel)) != "nintendo")
}
LIMIT 20

question: Which games were released after 2010?
sparql:
PREFIX vg: <http://videogame-kg.org/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?title ?releaseYear WHERE {
    ?game vg:hasTitle ?title .
    ?game vg:releaseYear ?releaseYear .
    FILTER(?releaseYear > "2010")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?releaseYear)
LIMIT 20

question: How many games does each publisher have?
sparql:
PREFIX vg: <http://videogame-kg.org/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT (rdfs:label AS ?devLabel) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?game) AS ?count)
WHERE {
    ?publisher vg:hasPublisher ?p .
    ?p rdfs:label ?devLabel .
    ?game vg:hasDeveloper ?dev .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dev)) = LCase(str(?devLabel)))
}
GROUP BY ?devLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
